ksa_text: Knowledge of model inventory management practices including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and documentation standards.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

onet.top_element_label: Estimating the Quantifiable Characteristics of Products, Events, or Information

top_anchors.element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-011 (RM, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4259 is insufficient to establish relevance to performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.426, eu_ai_act=0.415, dcwf=0.407) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4259 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-K-011 (composite 0.4259) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.4259 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.4259 is not a standard requirement for Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4259, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
